prs.title: Add assertion for missing rule ID in get_rule_by_id
Prevent cp errors from masking bundle-bin failure
Prevent crash on empty website input
Ensure destination directory exists before copying
Fix logic error where timeouts return '🔴' instead of '⚪'
Prevent HAProxy config corruption on empty source
Stop tracking docs/.vitepress/dist in git and add it to .gitignore.
Fix race condition in in-memory rate limiter
Add empty dict validation to process()
Prevent YAML parsing of empty files
Add validation for Reed-Solomon shard counts
Guard against non-finite BPM values in findBestRatio
Guard against invalid nucleotide characters in sequence
Guard against missing input files before backup
Guard against empty input in chunk_markdown()
Guard against empty git output to prevent invalid hash
